the manner of framing of charge by the Trial Court. On this aspect, 
the High Court has noted thus:
“25. The Code lays down various provisions with regard 
to the framing of charges against an accused. On perusal 
of charge sheet dated 06.12.2017, it is mentioned that the 
date of occurrence of the incident was on 02.07.2016, but 
the ferdbeyan dated 02.07.2016, states that the daughter of 
the informant was pregnant for three months and few days 
as according to the treatment of the victim which was done 
on 01.07.2016. Further, on perusal of the F.I.R and case 
diary, the statement of the victim which is in para-3 of the 
case diary dated 02.07.2016, she has stated that the first 
incident, where Manish Tiwary (appellant no. 2) raped her 
three to four months back during the time of Holi and after 
a few days, the victim stated that Hare Ram Sah (appellant 
no. 1) raped her while she was searching for her brother. 
It is factually impossible that the incident was reported on
